      #turnstile-terms {
        margin-top: 1rem;
        display: flex; /* Make the paragraph a flex container */
            align-items: center; /* Center items vertically */
            justify-content: center; /* Center items horizontally */
            gap: 0.5rem; /* Space between text and logo */
      
      }
      .bot{
        height: 350px;
        width: 350px;
        padding-top: 50px;
        padding-right: 40px;
      }

      .title {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 1.125rem; /* Equivalent to 18px for text-lg */
  line-height: 1.25rem; /* Equivalent to 20px for text-lg */
  letter-spacing: 0.125rem; /* Equivalent to 2px for tracking-wider */
  color: #000000; /* Equivalent to text-white */
  text-align: center; /* Equivalent to text-center */
  margin-top: 350px;
}

@media (min-width: 640px) {
  .title {
    font-size: 1.25rem; /* Equivalent to 20px for text-xl */
    line-height: 1.5rem; /* Equivalent to 24px for text-xl */
  }
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .title {
    font-size: 1.5rem; /* Equivalent to 24px for text-2xl */
    line-height: 1.75rem; /* Equivalent to 28px for text-2xl */
  }
}

@media (min-width: 1024px) {
  .title {
    font-size: 1.875rem; /* Equivalent to 30px for text-3xl */
    line-height: 2rem; /* Equivalent to 32px for text-3xl */
  }
}

@media (min-width: 1280px) {
  .title {
    max-width: 42.5rem; /* Equivalent to 680px for max-w-[700px] */
  }
}

@media (min-width: 1536px) {
  .title {
    max-width: 70rem; /* Equivalent to 1120px for max-w-[1200px] */
  }
}

@media (min-width: 1536px) {
  .title {
    max-width: 87.5rem; /* Equivalent to 1400px for max-w-[1500px] */
  }
}
.my-svg {
      width: 50px;
      height: 50px;
    } 

    .text-logo-container {
  display: flex; /* Make the paragraph a flex container */
  align-items: center; /* Center items vertically */
  justify-content: center; /* Center items horizontally */
  gap: 0.5rem; /* Space between text and logo */
}



    </style>
    
    <script
      async
      defer
      src="https://challenges.cloudflare.com/turnstile/v0/api.js"
      nonce="HD0nmOvBXBP6cq9c2Ww3v6lXe1XroYey"
    ></script>
    
  </head>
  <body
  class="bot2"
  >
    <!-- border top -->
    <div
      class="-z-10 fixed flex justify-center w-full translate-x-56 xsm:translate-x-48 3xl:translate-x-60 top-4"
    >
      
    </div>
    <!-- end border top -->

    <!-- border bot -->
    <div
      class="-z-10 fixed flex justify-center w-full translate-x-56 xsm:translate-x-48 3xl:translate-x-60 bottom-24"
    >
      
    </div>
    <!-- end border bot -->

    <!-- border left -->
    <div
      class="-z-10 fixed hidden lg:flex justify-start w-full -translate-x-56 top-1/2"
    >
      
    </div>
    <!-- end border left -->

    <!-- traits x -->
    <div
      class="-translate-y-4 -z-10 fixed w-screen h-screen justify-between hidden lg:flex items-center px-28"
    >
      <!-- trait left -->
      
        
      <!-- end trait left -->
      <!-- trait right -->
      
        
      <!-- end trait right -->
    </div>
    <!-- end traits x -->

    <!-- traits y -->
    <div
      class="translate-x-24 xsm:translate-x-0 -z-10 fixed w-screen h-screen justify-between flex flex-col items-center pt-2 lg:pt-6 pb-24 lg:pb-28"
    >
      <!--trait top -->
      


      </div>
        
        
      <!-- end trait top -->

      <!--trait bot -->

      <!-- end trait bot -->
    </div>
    <!-- end traits y -->

    <!-- content -->
    <main
      class="overflow-hidden relative z-10 w-full h-full flex-col lg:flex-row flex justify-center items-center"
    >
    
      <!-- text -->
      <div
        id="text-container"
        class="-translate-y-12 md:-translate-y-20 w-full z-10 flex flex-col justify-center items-center"
      >
      
        <h1
          class="lg:max-w-[700px] xl:max-w-[1200px] 2xl:max-w-[1500px] uppercase title text-lg xsm:text-xl sm:text-2xl 2xl:text-3xl tracking-wider text-white text-center" 
        >
        </h1>
        <h1>
        Verify that you are human. This may take a few seconds
        </h1>
        
        

        <noscript>
          <p
            class="lg:max-w-[700px] xl:max-w-[1200px] 2xl:max-w-[1500px] mx-2 mt-4 text text-xs xs:text-sm sm:text-base 2xl:text-lg 3xl:text-xl text-secondary text-center"

            
          >
            JavaScript needs to be enabled in order to visit this website.
          </p>
        </noscript>    
        
        <form class="hidden" method="POST" action="/challenge" id="form">
          <input type="hidden" name="token" id="token" />
        </form>
        <div class="mt-8 flex flex-col justify-center items-center">
          
          <div
            class="cf-turnstile"
            data-size="normal"
            data-sitekey="0x4AAAAAABbvRBZADh8X3U3y"
            data-callback="send_challenge"
          ></div>
          
          <p class="text-logo-container">
            This site is protected by
